summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of new Industry Layers (Grain Fumigation, FSS Milling, Grain Terminals). All 11 features tested - 10 passed, 1 partially tested (popup click). New layers display correctly with proper counts, master toggles work for groups, expand/collapse works, Market Views don't activate new layers, Win Zones work correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: React hydration warning: nested button inside button (visibility toggle inside card header button)

passed_tests: Grain Fumigation layer toggle works and shows 59 points on map - PASS
FSS Milling group master toggle turns all 4 sub-layers ON/OFF - PASS
FSS Milling individual sub-layers toggle independently (FSS Grain, FSS Flour Mills, FSS Specialty Mills, FSS Mix Plants) - PASS
FSS Milling group expands/collapses when clicking the arrow - PASS
Grain Terminals group master toggle turns all 8 sub-layers ON/OFF - PASS
Grain Terminals individual sub-layers toggle independently - PASS
Layer Stats show correct counts when layers are active - PASS (all 13 layers verified)
Market Views (Wheat, Corn, etc.) still work correctly and don't activate any new layers - PASS
Win Zones still work with Wheat market view - PASS (shows Central North Dakota #1, Central Kansas #2, West Montana #3)
partially_tested: Clicking on a point shows popup with company name, layer type, and city/state - PARTIAL (popup code verified in MapboxVisualization.js lines 689-754, but automated clicking on small map points was difficult)
action_items: MINOR: Fix nested button warning in WinZoneCards.js - change outer button to div with onClick handler
critical_code_review_comments: WinZoneCards.js has nested button elements (visibility toggle button inside card header button) causing React hydration warning - should refactor to use div with onClick for outer element
test_credentials: No authentication required. Mapbox token configured in frontend/.env
seed_data_creation: All new layer data already loaded in location_points collection
context_for_next_testing_agent: New Industry Layers added: Grain Fumigation (59), FSS Milling group (4 sub-layers: Grain 1019, Flour Mills 161, Specialty Mills 372, Mix Plants 81), Grain Terminals group (8 sub-layers: SRW Wheat 61, HRW Wheat 17, HRS Wheat 8, Corn & Soybean 25, Rough Rice 21, Oats 6, Soybean Oil 35, Soybean Meal 33). Key data-testids: layer-toggle-Grain Fumigation, sublayer-group-fss_milling, sublayer-toggle-all-fss_milling, sublayer-group-terminals, sublayer-toggle-all-terminals, layer-toggle-FSS Grain, layer-toggle-Terminals SRW Wheat, etc. Groups are collapsed by default. Master toggle on group header turns all sub-layers on/off. Popup shows name, layer type, city/state, and optional fields (capacity, type, commodity).

grain_fumigation.details: 59 points displayed, toggle works, radius toggle available

fss_milling_group.details: Master toggle turns all 4 sub-layers ON/OFF, expand/collapse works, badge shows active count

fss_milling_sublayers.details: FSS Grain (1019), FSS Flour Mills (161), FSS Specialty Mills (372), FSS Mix Plants (81) - all toggle independently

grain_terminals_group.details: Master toggle turns all 8 sub-layers ON/OFF, expand/collapse works, badge shows active count

grain_terminals_sublayers.details: All 8 terminal types toggle independently with correct counts

layer_stats.details: All 13 new layers show correct counts in Layer Stats section

market_views_isolation.details: Wheat market view does NOT activate Grain Fumigation, FSS Milling, or Terminals layers

win_zones.details: Win Zones work correctly with Wheat market view - shows Central North Dakota #1, Central Kansas #2, West Montana #3

popup.details: Popup code verified in MapboxVisualization.js (lines 689-754) with capacity, type, commodity fields. Automated clicking on small map points was difficult.

note: Problem statement mentioned 62 Grain Fumigation records but actual data shows 59 - this is a data discrepancy, not a code issue
